content.en:
The Beifeng family, which had lost the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm, would not be able to rise at all in the future, and could only be reduced to a small force.

Even with the blessing of Tianshan Pavilion and Ye Tian, they will not be able to occupy a dominant position in the Northern Forward Domain, and will definitely be suppressed by other forces, and eventually become obscure.

"I can only blame the Beifeng family for dying!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Northern Ancestors of the Beifeng Family have fallen, and now they have taken refuge in the Tianshan Pavilion, and they dare to hide such a thing, and they have such careful thoughts.

Think he's not able to make it and won't get angry?

Of course.

The Beifeng family didn't expect Ye Tian to be so powerful, and he was able to fight the Dragon Ancestor to admit and negotiate, and he also told the story of the Beifeng family.

Otherwise, the Beifeng family really has nothing to do.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Northern Forward Domain.

And his other replica body has come to the Ruins of Reincarnation in the Valley of the Ruins.

There are many ruin insects in the Ruin Worm Valley, and among them is the Tai'er Ruin Worm.

According to the agreement with the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor, he needed to capture a million Tai'er Ruins Worm and send them to the Land of the Swinging Sea, which could be regarded as completing the transaction.

The Tai'er Ruins Insect is not strong, it just takes a little time to catch it, and the most powerful Tai'er Ruins Insect is only in the Origin Upper Realm, and most of the Tai'er Ruins Insect is only comparable to the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, and they have no strength.

Once, Beizu came here to arrest many times, and there was no danger.

After Ye Tian entered the Tai'er Ruins Worm, he began to look for the Tai'er Ruins Worm.

With his ability to copy his talent, he could easily lock on to the location of the Tai Ruin Worm.

"There are some Tai Ruin Worms here!"

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and grabbed hundreds of Tai'er Ruins Worms and put them away.

After that, the Tai'er Ruins worm fell into his hands.

After a while, a million Tai Ruin Worms have been gathered.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian tore apart the barrier between the ruins of reincarnation and the land of eternity, and soon returned to the land of eternity, and then returned to the land of the Stygian Mountain Domain.

......

The Land of the Sea.

When Ye Tian came here again, he found a problem.

"No, the number of cursed dragons has increased by !!"

He had killed a lot of Tai'er Cursed Dragons before, that is, the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor woke up in time to stop him.

However, he still has some understanding of how many cursed dragons are left.

But at this time, the number of Tai'er cursed dragons here is much higher than before.

This situation is clearly not right.

However, Ye Tian now needs to trade with Tai'er Curse Dragon to complete the agreement.

"Tai O Curse Dragon Ancestor, here are millions of Tai Wo Ruins Worms!"

Ye Tian threw the Tai'er Ruins Worm over.

The Tai'er Curse Dragon checked it and made sure that there was no mistake in the quantity, and immediately spat out a large amount of Tai'er Jin soil from its mouth.

"Lord of Endless, these Tai Erjin Soil are for you!"

The two sides swapped deals.

Before leaving, Ye Tian asked, "Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor, I'm a little curious, why did your clan suddenly have so many more?"

Rumble!!!!

Tai'er cursed dragon's eyes became cold, and the breath of his whole body rioted.

"Lord of Endless, I don't need to answer you, it's time for you to leave! I hope you don't just set foot in the Land of the Swinging Sea in the future!" said the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor.

Ye Tian didn't speak and left directly.

However, from the words of the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor, he also knew that this was afraid that it involved secrets, and the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor was definitely unwilling to say it.

Subsequently.

He inquired about Yan Zu, but Yan Zu didn't understand the situation.

Maybe only an existence like a desolate ancestor can probably know the situation!

"The place where the Sea Abyss Beast Ancestor and the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor are staying must contain secrets, otherwise, why don't they choose to leave and stay there?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's like the Tai Curse Dragon Ancestor, he didn't follow the other Tai Curse Dragons out of the land of the sea at all, if he came out first, he wouldn't want to kill so many Tai Curse Dragons.

The point is.

Even in the midst of the battle, the Dragon of the Curse of Fortune still shielded an area in the core of the Land of the Swinging Sea, and it seemed that there was a secret hidden there.

"The land of eternity, but any place where the overlord creatures of the Origin Upper Realm stay, are very mysterious!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

He was going to find some weak Origin Upper Realm Overlord creatures, maybe where they were, he would be able to find out what secrets were hidden.

......

The Unsullied Abyss.

The Unsullied Demon Vine is here.

Ye Tian came here again, once upon a time, this Innocent Demon Vine with the strength of the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm was an existence that was difficult for him to approach.

But now, this Innocent Demon Vine is just like that, and it is no longer his opponent.

Wow!

As soon as Ye Tian approached here, the countless rattans of the Innocent Demon Vine whipped over.

Then.

Ye Tian held the Reincarnation Treasure in his hand, and with a slight wave, he shattered countless rattans, and a terrifying force spread to the Innocent Demon Vine, directly causing the Innocent Demon Vine to crack continuously, and it seemed that he couldn't withstand the blow of his opponent at all.

The actual strength of the Innocent Demon Vine is comparable to that of an ordinary Origin Upper Realm Overlord, at most comparable to an Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and may even be weaker.

Such an Innocent Demon Vine is naturally very weak to him.

The Innocent Demon Vine should not know the existence of the Ten Thousand Races Agreement, when the Ten Thousand Races Agreement was signed, the Innocent Demon Vine was estimated to have not been born, but it is definitely not ordinary here.

I saw Ye Tian stretch out his hand and grab it, and directly uprooted the body of the Innocent Demon Vine from the land of the Innocent Abyss, no matter how the Innocent Demon Vine resisted, it was useless.

Just as the Innocent Demon Vine was being uprooted, a crack appeared.

Previously, the body of the Innocent Demon Vine had covered this crack, but now it was directly revealed.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian sensed a powerful and chaotic energy from this crack.

"What is this place?"

Ye Tian tried to communicate with this Innocent Demon Vine, but the intelligence of a plant-based creature like the Innocent Demon Vine was very low, even if it had a certain amount of wisdom, it would not communicate with Ye Tian honestly.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian directly pinched this Innocent Demon Vine to death.

After killing the Innocent Demon Vine, Ye Tian began to copy the body of the Innocent Demon Vine.

After a while, a copy of the body of an unsullied demon vine was copied.

He was going to use the Unsullied Vine replica body to explore the rift and see what was behind it.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's Innocent Demon Vine Replica Body stretched out a rattan and spread into the crack, as long as it spread and stretched over, you could see the situation on the other side of the crack.
